facebook.caption:
528 reviews for a grocery store. That means tourists kept coming back.

Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng is the no-nonsense stop locals and long-stay visitors actually use. Snacks, water, beach supplies, and the random things your hotel doesn't stock. 4.3 stars across hundreds of real visits.

If you're self-catering or just need supplies before the beach, this is your spot.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
